category.name: zoo.eventABtrade.layer
category.item: Hello, I'm Lukáš, the director of the zoo in the neighboring town. I heard that your animal nurse, Soňa Starostlivá, is breeding new animal species that I'm very interested in. For every male of the species %priceSpecies%, I'll give you a male of the species %rewardSpecies% or a female for a female. During my presence, the incubation time of your species %priceGenus%s will be reduced from 20 to 2 hours! So, are you in?
I am now returning to my zoo. Thanks a lot and I hope to see you again soon!
